parametrized_description: An amusement park is installing cash-based machines and card-only machines. A cash-based machine can process A people per hour, while a card-only machine can process B people per hour. The cash-based machine needs C rolls of paper per hour, while the card-only machine requires D rolls of paper per hour. The amusement park needs to be able to process at least E people per hour but can use at most F paper rolls per hour. Additionally, the number of card-only machines must not exceed the number of cash-based machines. The objective is to minimize the total number of machines in the park.

D.description: Quantity of paper rolls utilized every hour by a machine that only accepts cards

F.description: The highest quantity of paper rolls that can be utilized in an hour

B.description: The hourly processing capacity of a card-only machine in terms of individuals

A.description: Hourly throughput of a cash-operated device in terms of individuals

C.description: Quantity of paper rolls utilized each hour by a cash-operated device

E.description: The least amount of individuals required to be handled every hour

a1.description: Part 1 of variable a: The quantity of cash-operated devices

a2.description: Part 2 of variable a: The quantity of cash-operated devices

b1.description: Part 1 of variable b: The quantity of machines solely for cards

b2.description: Part 2 of variable b: The quantity of machines solely for cards

constraints.description: The count of machines exclusively for cards should not surpass the quantity of machines accepting cash.
The sum of individuals served every hour by both cash and card-only devices should be no less than E.
constraints.formulation: A \cdot a1 + a2+ B \cdot b1 + b2 \geq E

constraints.description: The combined hourly usage of paper rolls by cash-based and card-only machines should not surpass F.
constraints.formulation: a1 + a2\times C + b1 + b2\times D \leq F

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr((a1 + a2)* C + (b1 + b2)* D <= F)

objective.description: Reduce the overall count of machines at the park.
